---
title: "Registration"
page-layout: article
toc: true
---

We are pleased to invite researchers, academics, students, and professionals to participate in the **1st Hybrid National Seminar on Bioactive Molecules: From Characterization to Innovative Biotechnological Applications**.

The seminar will be held in **hybrid format**, allowing participants to attend either **in person** at the National Higher School of Biotechnology (ENSB), Constantine, or **online**.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Registration Fees

| Category                 | Registration Fee |
|:-------------------------|-----------------:|
| PhD Students             |     **3,000 DA** |
| Professors & Researchers |     **6,000 DA** |
| Industrial Participants  |     **9,000 DA** |

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Registration Includes

The registration fee covers:

-   Participation in all scientific sessions
-   Access to keynote lectures
-   Conference materials
-   Certificate of participation
-   Coffee breaks
-   Book of Abstracts (digital version)

> **Note:** Lunch and accommodation are not included unless otherwise specified.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## How to Register

### Step 1

Complete the online registration form.

> **Registration Form:** *(Available Soon)*

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Step 2

Pay the registration fee according to your participant category.

Payment instructions will be communicated after registration.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Step 3

After payment confirmation, you will receive

-   Registration confirmation
-   Payment receipt
-   Practical information
-   Access information for online participants

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Important Dates

| Event                        | Date                     |
|------------------------------|--------------------------|
| Registration Opens           | June 30, 2026            |
| Abstract Submission Deadline | September 30, 2026       |
| Notification of Acceptance   | November 15, 2026        |
| Registration Deadline        | November 22, 2026        |
| Seminar                      | **November 29–30, 2026** |

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Participation Modes

### 🏛️ On-site Participation

Participants may attend the seminar at

**National Higher School of Biotechnology (ENSB)**\
Taoufik Khaznadar Campus\
Ali Mendjeli\
Constantine, Algeria

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### 💻 Online Participation

Participants unable to travel may attend virtually.

Connection details will be sent after registration.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Cancellation Policy

-   Registration fees are non-refundable except in exceptional circumstances approved by the Organizing Committee.
-   If the seminar schedule changes, registered participants will be informed promptly.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Need Assistance?

For registration inquiries, please contact:

📧 **Email:**\
**nsbm\@ensbiotech.edu.dz**

☎ **Telephone:**\
+213 5 50 84 74 87

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: callout-important
## Register Early!

Early registration is recommended to facilitate the organization of the seminar and ensure a smooth participation experience.
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Frequently Asked Questions

### Can I participate online?

Yes. The seminar is organized in a **hybrid format**, allowing both in-person and online participation.

### Is a certificate provided?

Yes. Every registered participant will receive an official **Certificate of Participation**.

### Can I attend without presenting a paper?

Yes. Participants are welcome to attend the seminar even if they are not presenting a contribution.

### How will I receive the online access link?

The access link will be sent by email after your registration has been confirmed.
